context_text: <B> well i i i agree that that testing can work sometimes and that we should have standards that that kids should be able to know certain things before they are out of high school / <A> uh-huh / <B> that there are things that they should know i think part of the problem that we as teachers feel there's no child left behind is that it's mandated by the federal government and they've i mean it there's a huge amount um i haven't even read all the things all the rules that i'm supposed to be following at this point / <A> uh-huh / <B> but um but we know that there's all that legislation there it's an unfunded mandate by the government / <A> uh-huh / <B> they say do this it'll be great and it'll help everybody but we're not going to pay any money toward this task / <A> right
